Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Deborah Lee, Esq. 248-602-3555 Petoskey Law Group for moving party.
No other appearance.

Hearing is held. The court states the TR is hearing required to give Mr. Alex Garay the opportunity to appear in court. No Appearance by Mr. Garay. The Court having reviewed the pleadings rules as follows:

Petoskey Law Group, Raymond Lee, Esq. and Deborah Lee Esq.'s Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for ALEX GARAY.

Granted. Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Continued To Dec-31-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

At the court's instruction, prior to open court, the clerk informs parties the court does not accept special appearances, informs Ms. Sandhu specially appearing for the moving party that Mr. Lee needs to appear since the court's tentative ruling is hearing required, and Mr. Lee signed the papers. If Mr. lee does does not appear at the hearing this morning the matter will be taken off-calendar.

Appearances (by Zoom):
Kenneth Tsang, Esq. 415-636-1323 specially appearing for Plaintiff.
Theresia Sandhu, Esq. specially appearing for the moving party.

9:43 Hearing is held. Mr. Tsang makes a general appearance and does not contest the tentative ruling. Ms. Sandhu and Mr. Lee are not present in Open Court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings rules as follows:

Petoskey Law Group, P.C. Atty. Raymond Lee's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for DEFENDANT ALEX GARAY.

Before the court is a Motion to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel Raymond Lee and Petoskey Law Group, PC, counsel of record for Defendant Alex C. Garay.

Off-calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Lauren Vazquez, Esq. 510-859-4949 specially appearing for moving party.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. The Court asks Mr. Vasquez if she belongs to the same firm as the moving party. Counsel answers in the negative. The Court's tentative ruling was hearing required. There being no appearance by moving party Mr. Lee or Defendant Alex Garay, the Court takes the matter off calendar.

Petoskey Law Group, Raymond Lee's Motion to be relieved as Counsel for Defendant Alex Garay.

Off calendar. No Appearance by moving party or Mr. Alex Garay.
